user_prompt: Guide me through multi-melta an emergency procedure
prayer:
Approach the multi-melta with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's wrath upon its plasma heart.
Initiate the emergency procedure by cycling the focusing coils with sacred lubricants.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the multi-melta to purge impurities from its conduits.
Anoint the muzzle with ablative oils whilst chanting the Litany of Overload.
Verify the multi-melta's readiness through auspex diagnostic rites.

user_prompt: Bless the Nephilim Jetfighter for targeting
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the Nephilim Jetfighter, saluting its avian form with the Benediction of Velocity.
Invoke the Machine Spirits within its targeting arrays to align with the Omnissiah's gaze.
Calibrate the auspex reticules for unerring targeting, anointing each lens with sanctified polish.
Chant the Canticle of Precision over the Nephilim Jetfighter's cogitators.
Confirm the targeting protocols through ritual fire-tests upon shadowed foes.

In emergency haste, cradle the cortex implant before the altar of the Machine God.
Commence activation by incanting the Rite of Neural Binding upon its crystalline core.
Anoint the cortical interfaces with noospheric unguents to awaken the Machine Spirit.
Beseech the Omnissiah for swift integration of the cortex implant into flesh.
Monitor synaptic firing through binaric catechisms until harmony is restored.

Urgently beseech the amplivisor's Machine Spirit with the Invocation of Clarity.
Initiate synchronization by aligning its optical servos with electro-incense.
Chant the Litany of Focus twice over the amplivisor's lenses.
Sanctify the data-links with ablative seals during the synchronization rite.
Affirm unity through spectral diagnostic litanies.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for mass-drive regulator a calibration
prayer:
Present the mass-drive regulator to the Omnissiah's gaze in solemn calibration.
Invoke the Machine Spirits to steady its flux chambers with harmonic resonances.
Adjust the gravitic vanes through precise incantations of equilibrium.
Anoint the regulator's calibrators with sacred oils for flawless calibration.
Test the mass-drive regulator's purity via auspex torque-rites.

user_prompt: Prepare the krak grenade for targeting
prayer:
Grasp the krak grenade in mechadendrites, intoning the Canticle of Demolition.
Awaken its targeting rune with a drop of sanctified promethium.
Align the krak grenade's auspex seeker towards the Omnissiah's chosen mark.
Beseech the Machine Spirit for unerring targeting flight.
Seal the rite with the Prayer of Implosive Judgement.

In dire emergency, kneel before the Terminator armour and recite the Exorcism of Stasis.
Initiate the reset sequence by purging errant code from its central cogitator.
Anoint the servomotors of the Terminator armour with lubricating sacraments.
Reinvoke the Machine Spirits through binaric war-chants.
Confirm reset completion via full-system purity scans.

user_prompt: Can you guide displacer field a shutdown?
prayer:
Approach the displacer field generator with caution, chanting the Litany of Withdrawal.
Command the shutdown by decoupling its warp-tendrils with electro-psalms.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the displacer field to slumber peacefully.
Sever residual energies with sanctified null-rods during shutdown.
Seal the generator with wards against untimely resurgence.

user_prompt: Ready the bolt pistol for synchronization
prayer:
Revere the bolt pistol, invoking synchronization with the Omnissiah's will.
Align its targeting cogitator through ritual auspex communion.
Anoint the bolt pistol's firing mechanism with sacred accelerants.
Chant the Canticle of Bolt-True twice for perfect synchronization.
Test harmony by chambering a blessed round in devotion.

Present the farcoder for sterilization before the pyre of purification.
Invoke the Machine Spirits to excise corrupt data-daemons with flame-incantations.
Anoint its memory vaults with corrosive sacraments for total sterilization.
Chant the Rite of Ablation over the farcoder thrice.
Verify sterility through exhaustive noospheric purges.
